text: {\fad(0,50)}Let's travel all through the worldwide seas,
{\fad(0,50)}If you've made up your mind, let the signal for departure
We were able to escape from the set course
along the boundary between sky and sea.
to a hidden adventure at the dark bottom of the sea.
Doesn't it sound fun just thinking about it?
Let's travel all through the worldwide seas,
If you've made up your mind, let the signal for departure
That feeling we had when we set sail
nothing will be able to scare me...
Now, as the trip approaches, our racing heartbeats
engrave a rhythm of adventure in our shy hearts.
Give them all out at a big party
Fill your empty heart with dreams.
If you color your heart with the blowing wind
Give them all out at a big party
{\fad(2000,2000)}The Hope and Despair of the Skeleton\Nand the Straw Hats' Counterattack!

name: Sanji
text: The only provisions we had are gone.

name: Sanji
text: They took all the food we've been stocking.

name: Luffy
text: Cheese and crackers are not enough for me!

name: Luffy
text: I even lost my pirate lunch...

name: Luffy
text: Cheese is not enough... not enough...

name: Sanji
text: Why didn't you chase her to the end of the earth?!

name: Usopp
text: But, we were in a critical situation and we couldn't go after her.

name: Sanji
text: Who and where the hell is he?!

name: Sanji
text: I'll go save her this instant!

name: Usopp
text: Right now, there are two things we must get back no matter what!

name: Usopp
text: That's not how you're supposed to rank them.

name: Usopp
text: First, let me explain about Nami and the shadows.

name: Luffy
text: He sure is brave to marry Nami.

name: Zoro
text: So, Luffy's and the cook's zombies have been confirmed, Usopp?

name: Usopp
text: I never thought he was one of the Seven Warlords...

name: Chopper
text: I'm scared all of a sudden.

name: Luffy
text: He was wearing wooden clogs so, I knew it wasn't you.

name: Zoro
text: If we find those three zombies and throw salt in their mouths, we'll get our shadows back, right?

name: Zoro
text: Anyway, good thing you found such a weakness.

name: Franky
text: The one who told us about their weakness and told us to come here and rescue you... was that skeleton.

name: Franky
text: And I asked him a foolish question shortly afterwards...

name: Franky
text: To be honest, the first time you said he'd tag along as one of our friends, I completely disagreed.

name: Franky
text: The more I talked with that clattering skeleton, I realized he really has bones.

name: Franky
text: While we're still at it, just answer me one more question.

name: Franky
text: If you go out in public with that look of yours, you know how people will react, right?

name: Franky
text: You're a talking skeleton, you know.

name: Franky
text: There's no way someone will befriend a guy with such evil looks.

name: Franky
text: Even if you manage to escape this cursed sea...

name: Franky
text: Decades of despair, unable to escape...

name: Franky
text: You said you were so lonely you wished to die, right?

name: Franky
text: If I were you, I'd no longer cling to life.

name: Franky
text: Having such insignificant existence and acting all chivalrous all the time...

name: Franky
text: Just tell us what're you hiding already.

name: Franky
text: To go that far... what do you want to achieve?

name: Franky
text: What is that promise you made to your friends that you talk about?

name: Brook
text: Long ago, our pirate crew left one of our friends behind at a certain place.

name: Brook
text: It was a very painful farewell, but...

name: Brook
text: As our ship departed, we promised we'd return no matter what.

name: Brook
text: Then, we were annihilated on this sea...

name: Brook
text: In order to not leave our promise unfulfilled....

name: Brook
text: As the only member of the crew who has lived long enough, I have the duty to inform him of these events.

name: Brook
text: Since the day of our deaths...

name: Franky
text: Hey! That was too long ago! I wasn't even born yet!

name: Franky
text: Sorry to say but, there's no way that guy could've waited such a long time!

name: Brook
text: Why would he wait for me?

name: Brook
text: He has the right to leave and not be kept waiting.

name: Brook
text: If by any chance he believed in our promise and has been waiting this whole time...

name: Brook
text: I can't imagine how lonely he must feel...

name: Brook
text: If he's been waiting this whole time while thinking we betrayed him...

name: Brook
text: I can't imagine how miserable he must feel!

name: Brook
text: The name of the friend to whom we swore to meet again on that cape is...

name: Brook
text: We couldn't take a little whale on our dangerous journey...

name: Pirates
text: Take care, Laboon! {I cant understand this so i kinda randomly timed it.. check it please-campa}

name: Pirates
text: We'll definitely come back for you!

name: Brook
text: I suppose he must've grown a lot by now...

name: Brook
text: I can't help but think he has believed in us since then.

name: Brook
text: He might be thinking that we'd play our cheerful music as always...

name: Brook
text: And return for him with open arms.

name: Brook
text: I cannot ask for forgiveness after we died so irresponsibly.

name: Brook
text: I cannot call him from the afterlife, after our reckless promise...

name: Brook
text: Because a man once said that they would return no matter what!

name: Sanji
text: The Twin Capes located at the entrance of the Grand Line.

name: Sanji
text: That's where we met that huge whale.

name: Sanji
text: It kept bumping it's head against the Red Line, the wall which divides the world.

name: Sanji
text: For 50 years, it waited for its pirate friends who promised to return after doing a lap around the world.

name: Sanji
text: Somehow, Luffy stopped its suicidal habit of hitting itself against that wall.

name: Sanji
text: And keeps waiting for its friends at those capes.

name: Usopp
text: Both of them have kept the promise they made 50 years ago!

name: Zoro
text: So, one of the friends Laboon has been waiting for is...

name: Ryuma
text: If you became stronger in these past 5 years...!

name: Ryuma
text: That's because our thoughts are the same!

name: Ryuma
text: As always, you keep treasuring that afro.

name: Ryuuma
text: You won't be able to protect such a huge weak point forever.

name: Brook
text: Whenever I think of how you must feel...

name: Brook
text: Although I don't have a heart now!

name: Brook
text: We were unable to overcome the challenges of the Grand Line.

name: Brook
text: Not only have I lost my friends...

name: Brook
text: My face, my body... I've lost everything...

name: Brook
text: You won't recognize me in the skeleton shape I am now...

name: Brook
text: At least... I have this head that looks like Laboon which amused everyone!

name: Brook
text: I'll protect it with my life...!

name: Franky
text: Now I love both the skeleton and the whale, damn it!

name: Luffy
text: Now I've made up my mind!

name: Luffy
text: Even if I have to drag him, I'll make him board this ship!

name: Robin
text: Would you change your mind even if we had any?

name: Usopp
text: I really want him to see Laboon again!

name: Chopper
text: I'm no longer afraid of skeletons!

name: Sanji
text: Now that we're fully aware of the situation...

name: Sanji
text: I'll personally go prevent Nami-san from getting married!

name: Zoro
text: We gotta recover an extra shadow now, don't we?

name: Zoro
text: Anyway, it won't be easy to find the zombies that have our shadows.

name: Chopper
text: You can't hope to beat that thing!

name: Luffy
text: We don't need to search for the zombies.

name: Zoro
text: If we stay like this, we'll never get close to the sunlight again.

name: Luffy
text: The old zombie man said it, didn't he?

name: Old man
text: I want you to beat a certain man...

name: Old man
text: I'm sure you can do it!

name: Old man
text: Despite the number of victims, if you beat him, everyone will be saved!

name: Luffy
text: If we take out Gekko Moriah, everyone's shadows will return!

name: Sanji
text: There he goes again... right to the point...

name: Luffy
text: If we climb those stairs, we'll find Moriah, right?

name: Luffy
text: I'll go kick Gekko Moriah's ass!

name: Luffy
text: Since that'll bring everyone's shadows back...

name: Luffy
text: Sanji, I'll leave Nami up to you.

name: Sanji
text: I don't care whether he is an invisible man or a ceramic man!

name: Sanji
text: I'll kick the hell out of him right through the other side of this fog!

name: Sanji
text: Like I'd let that wedding take place!

name: Usopp
text: Ah, I forgot to mention it, but that invisible man saw Nami completely naked in the bathroom.

name: Usopp
text: I feel guilty for letting Nami get kidnapped right before my eyes.

name: Usopp
text: But mostly it's because I don't wanna come across that Warlord again!

name: Franky
text: If Straw Hat beats Moriah first, that'd solve one problem but...

name: Franky
text: Until that happens, getting killed by his own shadow is a serious matter.

name: Zoro
text: I'm curious about how strong this so called "Legendary Samurai" zombie is.

name: Robin
text: For the time being they're our priority.

name: Robin
text: After that, defeating Moriah is definitely the key to victory.

name: Chopper
text: It's not as simple as you say.

name: Chopper
text: Our enemy is one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea!

name: Chopper
text: I beg of you, be careful!

name: Chopper
text: Especially since... I know I already said it, but your zombie is terribly huge!

name: Usopp
text: It's my Special Zombie-Purifying Salt Ball.

name: Zoro
text: Ah, so this is what you were making a while ago.

name: Usopp
text: I've got a word of advice for you all.

name: Usopp
text: No matter how thick the fog is within this sea...

name: Usopp
text: There's no guarantee sunlight won't get through it!

name: Usopp
text: We're only safe because it's midnight!

name: Usopp
text: In other words, when the sun arises at daybreak, that's our ultimate time limit!

name: Luffy
text: Reaching daybreak without tasting food is the worst!

name: Luffy
text: We'll make you regret having messed with us!

name: Luffy
text: We'll take twice the food that was stolen...!

name: Usopp
text: No, you see... that's not it...

name: Usopp
text: I mean the limit to recover our shad-

name: Oars
text: Alright, I'll become the Pirate King with this ship!

name: Perona
text: He climbed to the top of the mast, Master.

name: Zombie
text: We can't just sit around doing nothing while such a huge zombie wanders aimlessly around the island!

name: Moriah
text: It's just a matter of time.

name: Moriah
text: Now that we have Oars, we'll be able to steal the shadows of much stronger warriors.

name: Moriah
text: From now on, we'll have Special Zombies coming one after another!

name: Moriah
text: We'll need stronger marionettes it seems, Hogback.

name: Hildon
text: The three whose shadows were stolen woke up at the ship and are heading this way with their friends!

name: Hogback
text: Those who get their shadows stolen can't wake up that quick!

name: Hildon
text: T-Their friends found a way to wake them!

name: Hildon
text: It seems they have some connection with the Humming One!

name: Hildon
text: Perhaps, that man told them what he knew!

name: Hildon
text: All of the pirates knowing how to purify the zombies is proof!

name: Hildon
text: Currently, they're running from place to place...

name: Hogback
text: The Wild Zombies, Surprise Zombies and Soldier Zombies, couldn't lay a hand on them...

name: Hogback
text: Even before the pirates knew about the salt!

name: Hogback
text: They'll take care of the pirates as long as they don't swallow salt!

name: Hogback
text: And what the hell is Absalom doing?!

name: Hildon
text: His wedding is about to start right now...

name: Hildon
text: Most of the general zombies are in attendance.

name: Hildon
text: Come to think of it, he asked if Hogback-sama could give one of his belly dances at the reception in 1 hour.

name: Hogback
text: A wedding ceremony is a once in a lifetime memorial event.

name: Perona
text: No need to rely on that beast.

name: Perona
text: If my ghosts weaken them, the Soldier Zombies will be more than enough to capture them.

name: Perona
text: Don't panic just because they know the zombies' weakness.

name: Perona
text: I'll capture every single one of them, so...

name: Perona
text: Prepare some marionettes for the shadows of the remaining pirates.

name: Perona
text: I'm going back to my room.

name: Hogback
text: I expect no less from the Ghost Princess.

name: Cindy
text: It would be best if you learned...

name: Hogback
text: In any case, you won't have to do anything.

name: Moria
text: I'll stay here a bit longer.

name: Moria
text: Oars amuses me more right now.

name: Hogback
text: Since Absalom isn't doing anything, I'd like to take command of just two zombies if it's possible.

name: Sanji
text: Who's the damn bastard who peeked while Nami-san was in the shower?!

name: Usopp
text: It seems we won't be needing salt for now...

name: Chopper
text: I wonder if they even care about the shadows...

name: Zombie
text: C-Commander! There are five people heading for the Dance Hall!

name: Zombie
text: And we can't handle the two on the bridge below!

name: Zoro
text: It angers me just thinking about me being caught by these weaklings!

name: Franky
text: If you're so grateful that I freed you, you can start calling me "big bro" if you want.

name: Luffy
text: If I were to be reborn, I would want to be a maggot...

name: Sanji
text: I have such large eyebrows... I'm better off dead...

name: Robin
text: When you touch them, you lose your will to live.

name: Robin
text: We haven't found a countermeasure to it...

name: Usopp
text: If they get us too, it'll be over!

name: Robin
text: The ghosts have almost caught up with us!

name: Chopper
text: No! If we all get caught, it's over!

name: Zoro
text: Leaving aside the fact that these two fell down...
